description: Dual residual classifier. Merges Gemini and Qwen neutral files by id, embeds response/Gemini/Qwen once each, then trains a logistic regression over the concatenation of two delta vectors: [response_emb - gemini_emb | response_emb - qwen_emb] (1536-dim). Each delta encodes what the neutral rewrite removed; having two independent neutrals gives the classifier two witnesses to the same ad signal. Frozen encoder, no fine-tuning. Extends setup103 to dual-provider residuals.
